name: zava-claims-cowork-plugin
description: Authenticated Zava Claims MCP plugin for Copilot Cowork - export claims to Excel

scripts.package: PowerShell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path manifest.json, color.png, outline.png, skills -DestinationPath zava-claims-cowork-plugin.zip -Force; Write-Host 'Plugin packaged: zava-claims-cowork-plugin.zip'"
scripts.package:unix: zip -r zava-claims-cowork-plugin.zip manifest.json color.png outline.png skills/
